rawAssistant: I'll fully restore your party to full health. Now that we're on the road, I'll also give you a small boost – here's an Antidote for any poison you might have picked up. On a personal note, do be careful with that cloak of yours in this misty weather; the wind can pick up soot from the east, and it's not easy to clean off once it gets stuck.
